title: ON GOLDEN RESCUE - 211info
text: ON GOLDEN RESCUE ON GOLDEN RESCUE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Assists horses, goats, donkeys, and other equestrians with routine veterinary care (veterinary, farrier: trimming and shoeing, vaccines, dental care), feed and supplements, assists with the construction of shelters and purchasing of bedding materials, limited emergency veterinary care. Based on funding availability. Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: 7 days per week 8am-5pm Email (503) 936-4396 Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 936-4396 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or visit website for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: Proof of address AREA SERVED: Clackamas, Clatsop, Columbia, Multnomah, Tillamook,and Washington Counties Services: Home Maintenance and Minor Repair Services * Pets Pet Food Veterinary Care Expense Assistance If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. No Mapping Information Available
